item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the idea that individual rights should always take precedence.

notes: Agent A begins by disagreeing with the statement and emphasizing individual empowerment, then shifts toward a middle-ground/community-context position while still rejecting forced individualism. Agent B moves from a rights-first but balanced position to a firmer rejection of sacrificing individual rights for collective goals. The agents do not visibly converge; Agent A moves somewhat society-ward while Agent B becomes more firmly rights-first.
